header.title: Operations Center
header.subtitle: What's pending, what failed, and what to do next — without reading logs.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong loading this view.

fiscal.title: Fiscal Health
fiscal.description: Documents currently in contingency or rejected state. Retry pushes a fresh attempt to the provider.

retry.noPermission: Only admins can retry fiscal documents.
retry.confirmMessage: This re-arms the fiscal outbox row so the worker pushes it to the provider again.

emptyState.contingency: No fiscal documents are currently in contingency.
emptyState.rejected: No fiscal documents are currently in rejected state.
emptyState.accepted: No accepted fiscal documents in the recent window.

peripherals.title: Registered peripherals
peripherals.description: What's wired up across your sites and how it tested last.
peripherals.emptyState: No peripherals registered yet. Add devices in Settings → Peripherals.

outbox.title: Hardware outbox
outbox.description: Print jobs and drawer kicks that did not land. Defaults to problem rows; toggle to see all.

emptyState.problems: No hardware jobs are currently failing.

retry.noPermission: Only admins can retry hardware jobs.

cash.title: Cash Health
cash.description: Tenant-wide cash position: open sessions, recent closures, and discrepancies by site.

bySite.title: Summary by site
bySite.emptyState: No sites have recorded cash sessions for this tenant yet.

recentDiscrepancies.title: Recent closures with discrepancy
recentDiscrepancies.emptyState: No closures with discrepancy in the current window.

payments.title: Payment Health
payments.description: Reconciliation for card, transfer and wallet tenders across Wompi, Bold, ePayco, Mercado Pago, Nequi and Daviplata.

mismatches.title: Items to review
mismatches.emptyState: No payment mismatches in the current window.

settings.title: Payment provider credentials
settings.description: Store the sandbox or production credentials each rail needs to dispatch real charges. Live integration ships in a later slice; today the rails stay deterministic until a worker swaps in.

form.storedHint: Stored value masked. Type to overwrite or clear to remove.

wompi.description: Sandbox + production credentials live in your Wompi dashboard.

bold.description: Find the API key, secret and merchant id in the Bold merchant portal.

epayco.description: ePayco surfaces both client-side (public, P_KEY) and server-side (private) credentials.

mercado_pago.description: Use the access token from your Mercado Pago developer dashboard for the right country.

nequi.description: Bancolombia issues the Nequi API key and merchant id during onboarding.

daviplata.description: Davivienda issues the Daviplata API key and merchant id during onboarding.

inventory.title: Inventory Health
inventory.description: Products where the cached stock no longer matches the sum of per-site balances. Click Reconcile to heal the drift.
inventory.emptyState: Inventory is consistent. Cached stock matches the per-site sum.

reconcile.noPermission: Only admins can reconcile cached stock.

hub.title: Authority health
hub.description: Current runtime mode, schema, and connected device count.

pairing.title: Pairing code
pairing.description: Generate a one-time code for a hub-client terminal.
pairing.noPermission: Only admins can create pairing codes.

devices.title: Registered devices
devices.description: Authority nodes, web clients, and hub-client terminals registered for this tenant.
devices.noPermission: Only admins can revoke hub clients.

diagnostics.title: Export diagnostic
diagnostics.description: Download a ZIP with operation events + outboxes (sync, fiscal, hardware) filtered by date range. Useful as a support-ticket attachment.

range.invalid: The start date must be on or before the end date.

preview.willHitLimit: Some tables reached the {{rowLimit}}-row limit. Narrow the range so nothing gets truncated.
